title: Short title
doc_html:
SUBPART A-3. COMPUTER SCIENCE EDUCATION

§187.1. Short title

            This Subpart shall be known as the "Computer Science Education Act".

            Acts 2022, No. 541, §1, eff. June 17, 2022.

SUBPART A-3. COMPUTER SCIENCE EDUCATION
§187.1.  Short title
This Subpart shall be known as the "Computer Science Education Act".
Acts 2022, No. 541, §1, eff. June 17, 2022.
